_doc: Hardware pin configuration for ESP32 (NodeMCU-32S). hardware field must match the compiled firmware target. ledPower drives the firmware-controlled status indicator (boot mismatch, delayed-action countdown, load-error fallback); on most NodeMCU-style boards GPIO 2 is wired to an onboard blue LED — see HARDWARE_CONFIG.md (TASK-231). debounceMs is the project-wide button-debounce window in milliseconds, applied to every configured button; omit the field to fall back to 100 ms (EPIC-028). pinNames maps physical GPIO numbers to role-based standard names so profiles can reference roles symbolically — see pin-names.schema.json for the v1 vocabulary (EPIC-029).
